mapper.select:
SELECT mi.inventory_id, mi.material_id, m.material_name AS materialName, m.material_type AS materialType, mi.quantity, m.unit AS unit, mi.expiration_date, m.safety_stock AS safetyStock, mi.inventory_status, mi.last_movement_date, mi.storage_location, mi.actual_quantity FROM material_inventory mi JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.material_id WHERE 1=1
AND mi.material_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialId}, '%')
AND m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%')
AND m.material_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialType}, '%')
ORDER BY ${sortColumn} ${sortDirection}
ORDER BY mi.received_date DESC
